# Pau Pedrejon — paupedrejon.com

> Full-Stack Software Engineer (React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, AI) based in Barcelona, Spain.
> Portfolio with production projects, professional experience, and open-source work.

## About

Pau Pedrejon is a software engineering student at Universitat Politècnica de Catalunya (UPC),
specializing in software engineering and AI. Available for opportunities in Barcelona and remote.
